Add HPCC++ parameter tuning blog post

Covers the NYU ECE-GY 6383 term project: control-theoretic analysis and
systematic parameter tuning for HPCC++ congestion control in AI datacenter
networks. Includes stability constraints, scaling rules for 100G/400G/800G

Bash(cd /Users/rougeboy/dev/xhovanim8.github.io && git add _posts/2026-02-24-hpcc-parameter-tuning.md && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Update HPCC++ post with actual paper findings

Rewrote based on the full paper. Now accurately reflects the csg-htsim
packet-level experiments \(432-node fat-tree, heavy_384 workload\), the
non-monotonic tail FCT sweep results, the mechanism ablation study
\(p_only/pd/no-clamp variants\), and the damping proxy grouping \(zeta\).
Clarifies that tail FCT is the correct objective for AI training jobs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(cd /Users/rougeboy/dev/xhovanim8.github.io && git add _posts/2026-02-24-hydroponic-system.md && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add hydroponics senior project blog post

Origin story post about the Farmingdale State College EET 452W capstone
project \(Spring 2022\): an enclosed automated hydroponic system built with
Arduino, pH/TDS/moisture/temperature sensors, relays, and water pumps.
Covers the build, the debugging sessions, what shipped vs what was planned,
and why this project was the start of everything.
